name: DataGrid
description: Enterprise grid: sort, filter, inline edit, multi-level group (client + server), pin, virtualize, export.

api.name: DataGrid
api.description: Enterprise grid: sort, filter, inline edit, multi-level group (client + server), pin, virtualize, export.

parameters.name: PageSizeOptions
parameters.description: The list of page-size options shown in the rows-per-page selector. Defaults to { 10, 25, 50, 100 }. Set to e.g. { 10, 50, 100, 200, 300 } for larger datasets, or to an empty array to hide the selector entirely.

parameters.name: ShowSearch
parameters.description: Show the global search box in the toolbar. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowColumnChooser
parameters.description: Show the Columns button (visibility/reorder menu). Default true.

parameters.name: ShowExport
parameters.description: Show the Export button and its format dropdown. Default true. Set false to hide export entirely. For fine-grained per-format control see ExportFormats.

parameters.name: ExportFormats
parameters.description: Which export formats appear in the Export dropdown. Default All. Set to e.g. Csv | Excel to hide PDF in WebAssembly where QuestPDF isn't supported. When no flags are set (or ShowExport is false), the Export button is hidden.

parameters.name: VirtualizeThreshold
parameters.description: Item count above which Blazor's <Virtualize> kicks in. Only relevant when ShowPagination is false (or PageSize > this threshold) — paged grids show at most PageSize rows at once and never trigger virtualization. Default 500.

parameters.name: VirtualItemSize
parameters.description: Estimated row height in CSS pixels — used by <Virtualize> to size the scroll spacers. Tune if your rows are taller (dense badges, two-line cells). Default 41px.

parameters.name: VirtualOverscanCount
parameters.description: Extra rows rendered above and below the viewport to hide pop-in during fast scrolling. Default 3.

parameters.name: GroupByFields
parameters.description: Ordered list of fields for multi-level grouping. When set (non-empty) this takes precedence over the single GroupBy parameter. Each entry must be a column Field. The grid renders nested group rows with increasing indentation per level; per-level aggregates are shown on each group header row.

parameters.name: ShowGroupPanel
parameters.description: Shows a slim bar above the grid that lists the current grouping levels as removable chips, plus a dropdown to add a new level from any Groupable column. Default false.

parameters.name: GroupPanelText
parameters.description: Placeholder/hint text shown in the group panel when no fields are grouped.

parameters.name: ChildItemsSelector
parameters.description: When set, the grid renders a hierarchical tree-grid: this selector returns a row's child rows (null/empty = leaf). Each parent row gets an expand chevron in the tree column (see TreeColumnField). Distinct from DetailTemplate, which is a flat expand-for-detail fragment. Tree-grid mode and grouping are mutually exclusive — when both are configured, tree-grid mode wins.

parameters.name: TreeGridDefaultExpanded
parameters.description: Whether tree nodes start expanded. Default false.

parameters.name: TreeColumnField
parameters.description: Field of the column that carries the tree chevron + indentation. Null (default) uses the first visible column.

parameters.name: OnTreeNodeExpand
parameters.description: Raised when a tree node is expanded or collapsed (the item, plus its new expanded state).

parameters.name: Expandable
parameters.description: When true, adds a small Expand icon to the toolbar. Clicking it renders the grid in a fullscreen modal overlay. Default false.

parameters.name: IsExpanded
parameters.description: When true, the grid is currently rendered in fullscreen. Bind this for programmatic control, or leave unbound to let the grid manage its own state via the toolbar button.

parameters.name: FullscreenTitle
parameters.description: Optional title shown in the fullscreen header bar. Defaults to "Data Grid".

parameters.name: Virtualized
parameters.description: Enables Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.Virtualization.Virtualize{TItem} with an ItemsProvider — rows are fetched from the backend in scroll-driven windows instead of paged. Requires OnRangeRequest. When active, pagination is hidden automatically and the grid renders a single tall scrollable body.

parameters.name: OnRangeRequest
parameters.description: Range-fetch callback used in virtualised server mode. The grid invokes this whenever the viewport scrolls into an unloaded window. The callback must return the requested slice plus the current total row count so the scroll spacers stay accurate.

parameters.name: OnBatchSave
parameters.description: Fired when the user clicks "Save all" while EditMode is Batch. Args carry the buffered modifications + added rows. On a clean callback return (no exception), the grid's pending-changes buffer is cleared automatically.

parameters.name: ShowAddRow
parameters.description: When true and NewItemFactory is set, renders a thin "+ Add row" trigger below the body. Each click creates a TItem via the factory, pushes it into the added-rows buffer, and immediately shows it inline so cells can be filled in. Only meaningful in Batch.

parameters.name: NewItemFactory
parameters.description: Factory used by the "+ Add row" trigger to produce a fresh TItem. Required when ShowAddRow is true. The returned item is stored in the added-rows buffer; the user fills its cells inline and the row is delivered via OnBatchSave.

parameters.name: ColumnVirtualize
parameters.description: Simplified column virtualization: caps the number of horizontally- rendered data columns at MaxVisibleColumns. Pinned columns always make the cut. Default false.

parameters.name: MaxVisibleColumns
parameters.description: Maximum columns rendered when ColumnVirtualize is true. Default 30.

parameters.name: BatchSaveAllText
parameters.description: Label for the batch-mode "Save all" button. Override for localization.

parameters.name: BatchDiscardText
parameters.description: Label for the batch-mode "Discard" button. Override for localization.

parameters.name: BatchAddRowText
parameters.description: Label for the batch-mode "+ Add row" trigger. Override for localization.

parameters.name: SelectionKeySelector
parameters.description: Optional key projector that identifies items across re-fetches. In server-mode where Items is a fresh instance per page-load, the default reference-based stale-selection cleanup wipes selections that survived a page. When this selector is set, the grid identifies stale-vs-still-selected rows by comparing keys instead of references — so a selection on page 1 stays applied after a page-2 fetch returns a fresh wrapper for the same logical row. Returning null from the selector for any item falls back to reference equality for that row.

parameters.name: Culture
parameters.description: CultureInfo used for cell value formatting (dates/numbers) and exports. When null (default), falls back to CurrentCulture. Useful when your app sets a different culture than the UI locale — e.g. force de-DE formatting in an English UI.

events.name: OnTreeNodeExpand
events.description: Raised when a tree node is expanded or collapsed (the item, plus its new expanded state).

events.name: OnBatchSave
events.description: Fired when the user clicks "Save all" while EditMode is Batch. Args carry the buffered modifications + added rows. On a clean callback return (no exception), the grid's pending-changes buffer is cleared automatically.

examples.title: Basic DataGrid
examples.code:
<DataGrid TItem="Employee" Items="@employees" PageSize="5" ShowPagination="true">
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Name" Field="Name" Sortable="true" />
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Department" Field="Department" Sortable="true" />
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Salary" Field="Salary" Sortable="true" Format="C0" />
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Start Date" Field="StartDate" Format="yyyy-MM-dd" />
</DataGrid>

examples.title: Column Groups + Footer Aggregates
examples.code:
@* DataGridColumnGroup wraps a contiguous run of column defs under a labelled parent
   <th colspan>. Set Aggregate on a column to surface a sticky footer total; FooterFormat
   formats just the total (cells in C0, totals in N0). *@
<DataGrid TItem="Employee" Items="@employees">
    <DataGridColumnGroup TItem="Employee" Label="Identity">
        <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Name" Field="Name" Sortable="true" />
        <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Department" Field="Department" Sortable="true" />
    </DataGridColumnGroup>
    <DataGridColumnGroup TItem="Employee" Label="Compensation">
        <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Salary" Field="Salary"
                           Sortable="true" Format="C0"
                           Aggregate="AggregateType.Sum" FooterFormat="N0" />
        <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Tenure" Field="StartDate"
                           Sortable="true" Format="yyyy-MM-dd" />
    </DataGridColumnGroup>
</DataGrid>

examples.title: Toolbar, Search & Filtering
examples.code:
<DataGrid TItem="Employee" Items="@employees" PageSize="5"
          ShowToolbar="true" ShowPagination="true">
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Name" Field="Name"
                       Sortable="true" Filterable="true" />
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Salary" Field="Salary"
                       Filterable="true" FilterType="DataGridFilterType.Number" Format="C0" />
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Status" Field="Status"
                       Filterable="true" />
</DataGrid>

examples.title: Minimal toolbar (search only)
examples.code:
<DataGrid TItem="Employee" Items="@employees" PageSize="5"
          ShowToolbar="true"
          ShowColumnChooser="false"
          ShowExport="false">
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Name" Field="Name" Sortable="true" Filterable="true" />
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Department" Field="Department" Sortable="true" Filterable="true" />
    <DataGridColumnDef TItem="Employee" Title="Salary" Field="Salary" Sortable="true" Format="C0" />
</DataGrid>

parameters.name: ServerVirtualizationProvider
parameters.description: When set, switches the body to ItemsProvider-mode virtualisation (window-fetched server scrolling). Null disables.

parameters.name: RowIndex
parameters.description: 0-based index of the owning row within DisplayedItems (non-grouped).

parameters.name: ColumnIndex
parameters.description: 0-based index of this column within the visible columns.

parameters.name: AriaColIndex
parameters.description: 1-based ARIA column index (includes any leading non-data columns).

parameters.name: Navigable
parameters.description: Whether this cell participates in roving-tabindex keyboard navigation. False in grouped mode where row indices are not globally unique.

parameters.name: FooterFormat
parameters.description: Optional .NET format string for the footer aggregate strip — overrides Format for the totals row only. Useful when the cell format differs from the desired totals format (e.g. cells "C2", totals "N0").

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Header label shown in the spanning th above the grouped columns.

parameters.name: HeaderClass
parameters.description: Extra classes for the spanning header cell — theming hook for the group.

parameters.name: Level
parameters.description: Nesting depth for multi-level grouping (0 = top level). Controls indentation.

parameters.name: Aggregates
parameters.description: Per-group aggregate strip rendered next to the group label.

parameters.name: AriaColIndex
parameters.description: 1-based ARIA column index (includes any leading non-data columns).

parameters.name: PageSizeOptions
parameters.description: Page-size options shown in the rows-per-page selector. Empty array hides the selector entirely.

parameters.name: RegisteredContent
parameters.description: The ToolbarContent{TItem} component the consumer placed inside the DataGrid, forwarded by the parent grid. When null, the toolbar's left slot renders just the search + filter chips; when non-null, its Class styles the wrapper and its ChildContent renders alongside the chips.

parameters.name: ShowSearch
parameters.description: Show the global search box. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowColumnChooser
parameters.description: Show the Columns (visibility/reorder) button. Default true.

parameters.name: ShowExport
parameters.description: Show the Export dropdown. Default true. Combined with ExportFormats.

parameters.name: ExportFormats
parameters.description: Which export formats to include in the dropdown. Default All.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Custom CSS classes applied to the wrapper around the toolbar content (the flex row holding your custom buttons + the filter chips).

source.content:
@namespace Lumeo @typeparam TItem @attribute [CascadingTypeParameter(nameof(TItem))] @implements IAsyncDisposable @inject Lumeo.Services.Localization.ILumeoLocalizer L @inject Lumeo.Services.ToastService Toast @{ // Defensive: keep the roving-focus cell within the current data extents. // This is a pure clamp of two ints — it never triggers a re-render — so it's // safe to run during render and covers every path that mutates _displayedItems // (sort, filter, paging, grouping, external data changes). ClampFocusedCell(); var context = new DataGridContext( Columns: _visibleColumns, // _visibleColumns is itself the filtered cache (Visible == true) — we // expose it explicitly under VisibleColumns so descendants don't have // to re-filter via Columns.Where(c => c.Visible) every render. VisibleColumns: _visibleColumns, DisplayedItems: _displayedItems.AsReadOnly(), SelectedItems: _selectedItems.AsReadOnly(), Sorts: _sorts, Filters: _filters, GlobalSearch: _globalSearch, CurrentPage: _currentPage, PageSize: PageSize, TotalCount: EffectiveTotalCount, SelectionMode: SelectionMode, EditMode: EditMode, IsLoading: IsLoading || (_serverService?.IsLoading ?? false), RowReorderable: RowReorderable, RowContextMenuEnabled: RowContextMenu is not null, OnRowClick: OnRowClick, OnRowDoubleClick: OnRowDoubleClick, OnSort: EventCallback.Factory.Create(this, HandleSort), OnFilter: EventCallback.Factory.Create(this, HandleFilter), OnSelectionChanged: EventCallback.Factory.Create(this, HandleSelectionChanged), OnCellEdit: OnCellEdit, IsRowSelected: IsRowSelected, IsRowExpanded: IsRowExpanded, IsRowEditing: IsRowEditing, ToggleSelection: ToggleSelection, SelectAll: SelectAll, ClearSelection: ClearSelection, ToggleRowExpand: ToggleRowExpand, StartRowEdit: StartRowEdit, CancelRowEdit: CancelRowEdit, CommitRowEdit: CommitRowEditAsync, GetEditValue: GetEditValue, SetEditValue: SetEditValue, RowClass: RowClass, RowStyle: RowStyle, PinnedLeftOffsets: ComputePinnedLeftOffsets(), PinnedRightOffsets: ComputePinnedRightOffsets(), GroupedSections: _groupedSections.Count > 0 ? _groupedSections.AsReadOnly() : null, GroupBy: GroupBy, IsGrouped: !IsTreeGridMode && EffectiveGroupFields.Count == 1 && _groupedSections.Count > 0, IsGroupExpanded: IsGroupExpanded, ToggleGroupExpand: ToggleGroupExpand, Culture: EffectiveCulture, GroupFields: _runtimeGroupFields.AsReadOnly(), GroupTree: (!IsTreeGridMode && EffectiveGroupFields.Count > 1 && _groupedTree.Count > 0) ? _groupedTree.AsReadOnly() : null, IsGroupPathExpanded: IsGroupPathExpanded, ToggleGroupPath: ToggleGroupPath, AddGroupField: AddGroupField, RemoveGroupField: RemoveGroupField, ShowGroupPanel: ShowGroupPanel, ChildItemsSelector: ChildItemsSelector, IsTreeGrid: IsTreeGridMode, TreeColumnField: EffectiveTreeColumnField, IsTreeNodeExpanded: IsTreeNodeExpanded, ToggleTreeNode: it => _ = ToggleTreeNodeAsync(it), TreeLevelOf: TreeLevelOf, TreeHasChildren: TreeHasChildrenOf, // --- Batch-edit context fields — wired to the per-cell pending-changes // buffer (_batchChanges) and the additive new-row buffer (_batchAdded). IsBatchEdit: EditMode == DataGridEditMode.Batch, IsCellDirty: IsCellDirty, GetBatchValue: GetBatchValue, SetBatchValue: SetBatchValue, GridId: _gridId, FocusedRow: _focusedRow, FocusedCol: _focusedCol, RowCount: _displayedItems.Count, ColCount: _visibleColumns.Count, OnCellKeyDown: HandleCellKeyDownAsync, OnHeaderKeyDown: HandleHeaderKeyDownAsync, Striped: Striped, HasPinnedLeft: _orderedColumns.Any(c => c.Visible && c.Pin == PinDirection.Left), Hoverable: Hoverable, ColumnGroups: _columnGroups ); } @{ RenderFragment gridRoot = @
@* Declarative column definitions *@
@ChildContent
@if (_serverService?.Error is not null) {
@L["DataGrid.ErrorLoadingData", _serverService.Error ?? ""]
} @if (ShowToolbar) { } @if (_contextMenuVisible) {
@if (RowContextMenu is not null && _contextMenuItem is not null) { @RowContextMenu(_contextMenuItem) }
} @if (EditMode == DataGridEditMode.Batch && HasPendingChanges) { @* Batch-edit pending-changes strip. Uses warning/amber theme tokens from lumeo.css (--color-warning, --color-warning-text). Sits above the table body so it's visually associated with dirty cells. *@
@{ // _batchChanges contains entries for both modified existing rows AND // newly-added rows (the latter seeded with an empty dict). Count only // changes to *existing* rows by excluding items that are in _batchAdded. var modifiedCount = _batchChanges.Keys.Count(k => !_batchAdded.Contains(k)); var pendingTotal = modifiedCount + _batchAdded.Count; } @($"{pendingTotal} pending change(s)")
} @if (ShowGroupPanel) { @* rc.41: real drop zone — header DnD now lands here. Visual highlight via _isGroupPanelDragOver. The dropped column's field comes from _dragState.SourceColumnId (set by HeaderCell.HandleDragStart). *@
@if (_runtimeGroupFields.Count == 0) { @(GroupPanelText ?? L["DataGrid.GroupPanelPlaceholder"]) } else { @for (var gi = 0; gi < _runtimeGroupFields.Count; gi++) { var field = _runtimeGroupFields[gi]; var col = EffectiveColumns.FirstOrDefault(c => c.Field == field); var label = col?.Title ?? field; @label @L["DataGrid.RemoveGrouping"] @if (gi < _runtimeGroupFields.Count - 1) { } } } @{ var addableCols = EffectiveColumns .Where(c => c.Groupable && c.Field is not null && !_runtimeGroupFields.Contains(c.Field!)) .ToList(); } @if (_runtimeGroupFields.Count > 0) { @* Clear-all button: lives next to the chips so it's discoverable and matches the per-chip X visual. rc.41 polish. *@ @L["DataGrid.ClearAllGrouping"] } @if (addableCols.Count > 0) { @* 2.2.0 — was a native

mdSummary:
# DataGrid

Enterprise grid: sort, filter, inline edit, multi-level group (client + server), pin, virtualize, export.

**Package:** `Lumeo.DataGrid` · **Category:** Data Display/Tables
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/data-grid

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| DataGrid | Items | `IEnumerable<TItem>?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | Columns | `List<DataGridColumn<TItem>>?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | Striped | `bool` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | Bordered | `bool` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | Compact | `bool` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | Hoverable | `bool` | `true` |  |
| DataGrid | Height | `string?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | SelectionMode | `DataGridSelectionMode` | `DataGridSelectionMode.None` |  |
| DataGrid | EditMode | `DataGridEditMode` | `DataGridEditMode.None` |  |
| DataGrid | PageSize | `int` | `10` |  |
| DataGrid | PageSizeOptions | `int[]` | `new[] { 10, 25, 50, 100 }` | The list of page-size options shown in the rows-per-page selector. Defaults to { 10, 25, 50, 100 }. Set to e.g. { 10, 50, 100, 200, 300 } for larger datasets, or to an empty array to hide the selector entirely. |
| DataGrid | ShowPagination | `bool` | `true` |  |
| DataGrid | ShowToolbar | `bool` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | ShowSearch | `bool` | `true` | Show the global search box in the toolbar. Default true. |
| DataGrid | ShowColumnChooser | `bool` | `true` | Show the Columns button (visibility/reorder menu). Default true. |
| DataGrid | ShowExport | `bool` | `true` | Show the Export button and its format dropdown. Default true. Set false to hide export entirely. For fine-grained per-format control see ExportFormats. |
| DataGrid | ExportFormats | `DataGridExportFormat` | `DataGridExportFormat.All` | Which export formats appear in the Export dropdown. Default All. Set to e.g. Csv \| Excel to hide PDF in WebAssembly where QuestPDF isn't supported. When no flags are set (or ShowExport is false), the Export button is hidden. |
| DataGrid | VirtualizeThreshold | `int` | `500` | Item count above which Blazor's <Virtualize> kicks in. Only relevant when ShowPagination is false (or PageSize > this threshold) — paged grids show at most PageSize rows at once and never trigger virtualization. Default 500. |
| DataGrid | VirtualItemSize | `float` | `41f` | Estimated row height in CSS pixels — used by <Virtualize> to size the scroll spacers. Tune if your rows are taller (dense badges, two-line cells). Default 41px. |
| DataGrid | VirtualOverscanCount | `int` | `3` | Extra rows rendered above and below the viewport to hide pop-in during fast scrolling. Default 3. |
| DataGrid | Reorderable | `bool` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | RowReorderable | `bool` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | GroupBy | `string?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | GroupsExpandedByDefault | `bool` | `true` |  |
| DataGrid | GroupByFields | `IReadOnlyList<string>?` | `` | Ordered list of fields for multi-level grouping. When set (non-empty) this takes precedence over the single GroupBy parameter. Each entry must be a column Field. The grid renders nested group rows with increasing indentation per level; per-level aggregates are shown on each group header row. |
| DataGrid | ShowGroupPanel | `bool` | `` | Shows a slim bar above the grid that lists the current grouping levels as removable chips, plus a dropdown to add a new level from any Groupable column. Default false. |
| DataGrid | GroupPanelText | `string?` | `` | Placeholder/hint text shown in the group panel when no fields are grouped. |
| DataGrid | ChildItemsSelector | `Func<TItem, IEnumerable<TItem>?>?` | `` | When set, the grid renders a hierarchical tree-grid: this selector returns a row's child rows (null/empty = leaf). Each parent row gets an expand chevron in the tree column (see TreeColumnField). Distinct from DetailTemplate, which is a flat expand-for-detail fragment. Tree-grid mode and grouping are mutually exclusive — when both are configured, tree-grid mode wins. |
| DataGrid | TreeGridDefaultExpanded | `bool` | `` | Whether tree nodes start expanded. Default false. |
| DataGrid | TreeColumnField | `string?` | `` | Field of the column that carries the tree chevron + indentation. Null (default) uses the first visible column. |
| DataGrid | OnTreeNodeExpand | `EventCallback<TItem>` | `` | Raised when a tree node is expanded or collapsed (the item, plus its new expanded state). |
| DataGrid | Expandable | `bool` | `` | When true, adds a small Expand icon to the toolbar. Clicking it renders the grid in a fullscreen modal overlay. Default false. |
| DataGrid | IsExpanded | `bool` | `` | When true, the grid is currently rendered in fullscreen. Bind this for programmatic control, or leave unbound to let the grid manage its own state via the toolbar button. |
| DataGrid | IsExpandedChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | FullscreenTitle | `string?` | `` | Optional title shown in the fullscreen header bar. Defaults to "Data Grid". |
| DataGrid | RowClass | `Func<TItem, string>?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | RowStyle | `Func<TItem, string>?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | EnableLayoutPersistence | `bool` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | LayoutStorageKey | `string?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | OnLayoutSave | `EventCallback<DataGridLayout>` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | SavedLayout | `DataGridLayout?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | GlobalLayouts | `List<DataGridNamedLayout>?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | OnSaveNamedLayout | `EventCallback<DataGridNamedLayout>` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | OnDeleteNamedLayout | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | ServerMode | `bool` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | OnServerRequest | `EventCallback<DataGridServerRequest>` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | TotalCount | `int` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | IsLoading | `bool` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | Virtualized | `bool` | `` | Enables Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.Virtualization.Virtualize{TItem} with an ItemsProvider — rows are fetched from the backend in scroll-driven windows instead of paged. Requires OnRangeRequest. When active, pagination is hidden automatically and the grid renders a single tall scrollable body. |
| DataGrid | OnRangeRequest | `Func<DataGridRangeRequest, ValueTask<DataGridRangeResponse<TItem>>>?` | `` | Range-fetch callback used in virtualised server mode. The grid invokes this whenever the viewport scrolls into an unloaded window. The callback must return the requested slice plus the current total row count so the scroll spacers stay accurate. |
| DataGrid | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | DetailTemplate | `RenderFragment<TItem>?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | EmptyContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | RowContextMenu | `RenderFragment<TItem>?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | OnRowClick | `EventCallback<TItem>` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | OnRowDoubleClick | `EventCallback<TItem>` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | OnCellEdit | `EventCallback<CellEditEventArgs<TItem>>` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | OnRowEdit | `EventCallback<RowEditEventArgs<TItem>>` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | OnBatchSave | `EventCallback<DataGridBatchSaveEventArgs<TItem>>` | `` | Fired when the user clicks "Save all" while EditMode is Batch. Args carry the buffered modifications + added rows. On a clean callback return (no exception), the grid's pending-changes buffer is cleared automatically. |
| DataGrid | ShowAddRow | `bool` | `` | When true and NewItemFactory is set, renders a thin "+ Add row" trigger below the body. Each click creates a TItem via the factory, pushes it into the added-rows buffer, and immediately shows it inline so cells can be filled in. Only meaningful in Batch. |
| DataGrid | NewItemFactory | `Func<TItem>?` | `` | Factory used by the "+ Add row" trigger to produce a fresh TItem. Required when ShowAddRow is true. The returned item is stored in the added-rows buffer; the user fills its cells inline and the row is delivered via OnBatchSave. |
| DataGrid | ColumnVirtualize | `bool` | `` | Simplified column virtualization: caps the number of horizontally- rendered data columns at MaxVisibleColumns. Pinned columns always make the cut. Default false. |
| DataGrid | MaxVisibleColumns | `int` | `30` | Maximum columns rendered when ColumnVirtualize is true. Default 30. |
| DataGrid | BatchSaveAllText | `string?` | `"Save all"` | Label for the batch-mode "Save all" button. Override for localization. |
| DataGrid | BatchDiscardText | `string?` | `"Discard"` | Label for the batch-mode "Discard" button. Override for localization. |
| DataGrid | BatchAddRowText | `string?` | `"Add row"` | Label for the batch-mode "+ Add row" trigger. Override for localization. |
| DataGrid | OnColumnReorder | `EventCallback<ColumnReorderEventArgs>` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | OnRowReorder | `EventCallback<RowReorderEventArgs<TItem>>` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | OnError | `EventCallback<Exception>` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | SelectedItems | `IReadOnlyList<TItem>?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | SelectedItemsChanged | `EventCallback<IReadOnlyList<TItem>>` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | SelectionKeySelector | `Func<TItem, object?>?` | `` | Optional key projector that identifies items across re-fetches. In server-mode where Items is a fresh instance per page-load, the default reference-based stale-selection cleanup wipes selections that survived a page. When this selector is set, the grid identifies stale-vs-still-selected rows by comparing keys instead of references — so a selection on page 1 stays applied after a page-2 fetch returns a fresh wrapper for the same logical row. Returning null from the selector for any item falls back to reference equality for that row. |
| DataGrid | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DataGrid | Culture | `System.Globalization.CultureInfo?` | `` | CultureInfo used for cell value formatting (dates/numbers) and exports. When null (default), falls back to CurrentCulture. Useful when your app sets a different culture than the UI locale — e.g. force de-DE formatting in an English UI. |
| DataGridBody | Context | `DataGridContext<TItem>?` | `` |  |
| DataGridBody | DetailTemplate | `RenderFragment<TItem>?` | `` |  |
| DataGridBody | EmptyContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| DataGridBody | UseVirtualization | `bool` | `` |  |
| DataGridBody | VirtualItemSize | `float` | `41f` |  |
| DataGridBody | VirtualOverscanCount | `int` | `3` |  |
| DataGridBody | ServerVirtualizationProvider | `Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.Virtualization.ItemsProviderDelegate<IndexedItem>?` | `` | When set, switches the body to ItemsProvider-mode virtualisation (window-fetched server scrolling). Null disables. |
| DataGridBody | HasDetailTemplate | `bool` | `` |  |
| DataGridBody | SkeletonRowCount | `int` | `5` |  |
| DataGridBody | OnContextMenu | `EventCallback<(TItem, double, double)>` | `` |  |
| DataGridBody | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| DataGridBody | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| DataGridCell | Context | `DataGridContext<TItem>?` | `` |  |
| DataGridCell | Item | `TItem` | `default!` |  |
| DataGridCell | Column | `DataGridColumn<TItem>` | `default!` |  |
| DataGridCell | RowIndex | `int` | `` | 0-based index of the owning row within DisplayedItems (non-grouped). |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (DataGrid) — RenderFragment slot
- `DetailTemplate` (DataGrid) — RenderFragment slot
- `EmptyContent` (DataGrid) — RenderFragment slot
- `RowContextMenu` (DataGrid) — RenderFragment slot
- `DetailTemplate` (DataGridBody) — RenderFragment slot
- `EmptyContent` (DataGridBody) — RenderFragment slot
- `CellTemplate` (DataGridColumnDef) — RenderFragment slot
- `HeaderTemplate` (DataGridColumnDef) — RenderFragment slot
- `EditTemplate` (DataGridColumnDef) — RenderFragment slot
- `FilterTemplate` (DataGridColumnDef) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (DataGridColumnGroup) — RenderFragment slot
- `DetailTemplate` (DataGridDetailRow) — RenderFragment slot
- `DetailTemplate` (DataGridRow) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (ToolbarContent) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OnTreeNodeExpand` (`EventCallback<TItem>`) — Raised when a tree node is expanded or collapsed (the item, plus its new expanded state).
- `IsExpandedChanged` (`EventCallback<bool>`)
- `OnLayoutSave` (`EventCallback<DataGridLayout>`)
- `OnSaveNamedLayout` (`EventCallback<DataGridNamedLayout>`)
- `OnDeleteNamedLayout` (`EventCallback<string>`)
- `OnServerRequest` (`EventCallback<DataGridServerRequest>`)
- `OnRowClick` (`EventCallback<TItem>`)
- `OnRowDoubleClick` (`EventCallback<TItem>`)
- `OnCellEdit` (`EventCallback<CellEditEventArgs<TItem>>`)
- `OnRowEdit` (`EventCallback<RowEditEventArgs<TItem>>`)
- `OnBatchSave` (`EventCallback<DataGridBatchSaveEventArgs<TItem>>`) — Fired when the user clicks "Save all" while EditMode is Batch. Args carry the buffered modifications + added rows. On a clean callback return (no exception), the grid's pending-changes buffer is cleared automatically.
- `OnColumnReorder` (`EventCallback<ColumnReorderEventArgs>`)
- `OnRowReorder` (`EventCallback<RowReorderEventArgs<TItem>>`)
- `OnError` (`EventCallback<Exception>`)
- `SelectedItemsChanged` (`EventCallback<IReadOnlyList<TItem>>`)

## Sub-components
- `DataGridBody`, `DataGridCell`, `DataGridColumnDef`, `DataGridColumnFilter`, `DataGridColumnGroup`, `DataGridColumnVisibility`, `DataGridDetailRow`, `DataGridFooter`, `DataGridGroupRow`, `DataGridHeader`, `DataGridHeaderCell`, `DataGridPagination`, `DataGridRow`, `DataGridToolbar`, `DataGridToolbarColumns`, `DataGridToolbarCopySelected`, `DataGridToolbarExport`, `DataGridToolbarFullscreen`, `DataGridToolbarLayouts`, `ToolbarContent`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`DataGridContext<TItem>?`)
- `ParentGrid` (`DataGrid<TItem>?`)
- `ColumnGroupId` (`string?`)
- `DragState` (`DataGridDragState?`)
- `DragStateCtx` (`DataGridDragState?`)
- `Parent` (`DataGrid<TItem>?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `ToastService` (Lumeo.Services)
- `ComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
- `Enter` — HandleCellKeyDown handles Enter in DataGridCell.razor
- `F2` — HandleCellKeyDown handles F2 in DataGridCell.razor
- `Enter` — OnEditKeyDown handles Enter in DataGridCell.razor
- `Escape` — OnEditKeyDown handles Escape in DataGridCell.razor
- `Tab` — OnEditKeyDown handles Tab in DataGridCell.razor
- `Escape` — HandlePinMenuKeyDown handles Escape in DataGridColumnVisibility.razor
- `Enter` — HandleKeyDown handles Enter in DataGridHeaderCell.razor
- ` ` — HandleKeyDown handles   in DataGridHeaderCell.razor
- `Spacebar` — HandleKeyDown handles Spacebar in DataGridHeaderCell.razor
- `Escape` — HandleMenuKeyDown handles Escape in DataGridToolbarColumns.razor
- `Enter` — HandleSaveKeyDown handles Enter in DataGridToolbarLayouts.razor
- `Escape` — HandleSaveKeyDown handles Escape in DataGridToolbarLayouts.razor

## Example
```razor
<DataGrid />
```
